zh.Ottenbuttel, Slesvig-Holstein, Preussen: 德國海因里希_史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 斯坦波格奧頓比特爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicolaus Krummedige von Ottenbüttel於大約1258年出生在德國史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 斯坦波格奧頓比特爾時，他的父親Eler Krummedige af Ottenbüttel63歲，母親n.n.60歲。他於大約1273年與n.n.在德國海因里希_史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 斯坦波格奧頓比特爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1281年在他的家鄉享年24歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicolaus Krummedige von Ottenbüttel于大约1258年出生在德国史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 斯坦波格奧頓比特爾时，他的父亲Eler Krummedige af Ottenbüttel63岁，母亲n.n.60岁。他于大约1273年与n.n.在德国海因里希_史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 斯坦波格奧頓比特爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1281年在他的家乡享年24岁。

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Nicolaus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

en.lifeSummary: When Nicolaus Krummedige von Ottenbüttel was born about 1258, in Ottenbüttel, Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Germany, his father, Eler Krummedige af Ottenbüttel, was 63 and his mother, n.n., was 60. He married n.n. about 1273, in Ottenbüttel, Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Prussia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1281, in his hometown, at the age of 24.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicolaus Krummedige von Ottenbüttel est né environ 1258, à Ottenbüttel, Kreis Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Allemagne, son père, Eler Krummedige af Ottenbüttel, avait 63 ans et sa mère, n.n., avait 60 ans. Il a épousé n.n. environ 1273, à Ottenbüttel, Kreis Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Prusse, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1281, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 24 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicolaus Krummedige von Ottenbüttel um 1258 in Ottenbüttel, Kreis Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eler Krummedige af Ottenbüttel 63 und seine Mutter n.n. 60. Er hat um 1273 in Ottenbüttel, Kreis Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Preußen, Deutschland n.n. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1281 im Alter von 24 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicolaus Krummedige von Ottenbüttelが約1258年にドイツスチレスウィグ-hオルステインクレイス ステインブルグオッテンブuッテルで生まれた時，父Eler Krummedige af Ottenbüttelは63歳，母n.n.は60歳であった。約1273年にドイツプレウssンスチレスウィグ-hオルステインクレイス ステインブルグオッテンブuッテルでn.n.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1281年に故郷で24歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicolaus Krummedige von Ottenbüttel(이)가 대략 1258년 독일 슐레스위그-홀스타인 크레이스 스타인버그 오텐브u텔에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eler Krummedige af Ottenbüttel(은)는 63세였고, 그의 어머니 n.n.(은)는 60세였다. 그는 대략 1273년 독일 프레우ss 슐레스위그-홀스타인 크레이스 스타인버그 오텐브u텔에서 n.n.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1281년 그의 고향에서 24세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicolaus Krummedige von Ottenbüttel nasceu aproximadamente 1258, em Ottenbüttel, Kreis Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemanha, seu pai, Eler Krummedige af Ottenbüttel, tinha 63 anos e sua mãe, n.n., tinha 60 anos. Ele casou-se com n.n. aproximadamente 1273, em Ottenbüttel, Kreis Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Preußen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1281, em sua cidade natal, com 24 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicolaus Krummedige von Ottenbüttel родился около 1258 г. в местности оттенбuттел, крис стинбург, щлесвиг-холстин, Германия, его отцу по имени Eler Krummedige af Ottenbüttel было 63 года, а матери, которую звали n.n., 60. Он женился на женщине по имени n.n. около 1273 г. в местности оттенбuттел, крис стинбург, щлесвиг-холстин, Пруссия, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1281 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 24 лет.

Se casó con n.n. aproximadamente 1273, en Ottenbüttel, Kreis Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Preußen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija.
